question: According to the chart data, during which period did the stock price increase by the larger amount?
explanation: The chart uses a non-linear (inappropriate) y-axis scaling function, so equal vertical distances do not correspond to equal changes in the underlying values. That can make one period look like it changed more even when the data show otherwise. 2010-2012: $20 → $61 (+$41); 2013-2015: $80 → $134 (+$54).
